---
skill_name: github-fetch-issues
version: 1.0.0
description: Fetches issues from a GitHub repository
required_credentials:
  - github_token
---

# GitHub Fetch Issues Skill

This skill allows the agent to fetch issues from a GitHub repository.

## Capabilities

- List open issues for a repository
- Read issue details including comments

## Requirements

Requires a valid GitHub personal access token with `repo` scope.
